decision: Quoted the object key 'raise_3.5' in HANDS[h012].gto_mix. Unquoted, '3.5' is parsed as a numeric property access making 'raise_3' a syntax error.
rationale: Caught at integrator-time via node --check on the assembled bundle. JS object literal keys with a dot must be string-quoted. No semantics change — still maps to the same logical action.
nested_equivalent: Under nested dispatch the Critic on the section-2 cycle would have caught this via its lint pass; the Builder would have re-emitted with the quote fix; the Overseer would have accepted on second cycle. Same end state.
